title: Code talkers : hearing before the Committee on Indian Affairs, United States Senate, One Hundred Eighth Congress, second session, on contributions of Native American code talkers in American military history, September 22, 2004, Washington, DC

# Code talkers : hearing before the Committee on Indian Affairs, United States Senate, One Hundred Eighth Congress, second session, on contributions of Native American code talkers in American military history, September 22, 2004, Washington, DC

Contributors: united states. congress. senate. committee on indian affairs
Date: 2004
Subjects: participation, indian, cryptography, indian code talkers, world war

Distributed to some depository libraries in microfiche. Shipping list no.: 2005-0085-P. Also available via Internet from the GPO Access web site. Address as of 2/28/05: http://frwebgate.access.gpo.gov/cgi-bin/getdoc.cgi?dbname=108%5Fsenate%5Fhearings & docid=f:96125.pdf; current access is available via PURL.
